posts.text: Post no. 216 has clear explanation .They are not just buying and selling the hardware .System integration is a totally different beast .

posts.author: anupammahor
posts.community: Ceinsys Tech-Engineering, Geospatial & IT solutions Company
posts.text: I like T second as a client but what I don’t understand is out of 30 order , 27 cr is for supply of hardware. CEINSYS has nothing to with manufacturing of these type of hardware . This will be a low margin order as they will procure and than sell. But why they are going in this direction ? is it just to inflate the order book and boost the stock price.
